Title: Equipment procurement & staging

Owner: Logistics

Description:
Procure and stage all field equipment: batteries, inverters, tablets, chargers, power meters. Create staging checklist and run acceptance tests.

Acceptance criteria:
- Procurement orders placed and tracking numbers recorded
- Acceptance tests for each equipment type executed and recorded
- Staging checklist completed and uploaded to `PROJECT_MANAGEMENT/STATUS`

Labels: logistics, high-priority
